---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: Bug report
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

**Timestamp:**
> [!TIP]
> Time the bug occurred for the first time and (if applicable) how often it occurs.

#### Summary
> [!TIP]
> Should be a short and precise description of the bug. It should be possible to tell what this bug is about, and where it occurs from reading the summary alone.

#### Components
> [!TIP]
> Which part of the system is affected?
> - _Tell us the component:_
- [ ] I don't know

#### Environment
> [!TIP]
> Provide specs of the machine. Enter the environment under which you found the bug, make sure to include any information which might be relevant to the bug (eg. your screen resolution, special plugins, etc.)

#### Description
> [!TIP]
> Make sure to include at least:
> - _A description of the bug._
> - _A very clear step by step description of how to reproduce the bug (if possible)._
> - _A description of what you expected, and a description of what actually happens._
> - _Screenshots or other attachments are always helpful, but optional._
